biography: Lili Anne Taylor is an American actress who works in film, television, and theater. She first gained recognition for her supporting roles in the 1980s and 1990s films Mystic Pizza and Say Anything. Taylor is known for her work in independent films like I Shot Andy Warhol (1996), Short Cuts (1993), and Dogfight (1991). She has also appeared in mainstream movies such as Public Enemies (2009) and The Conjuring.
name: Lili Taylor
